subject: Sports
title: The Birth of Football
description: A quick win: understand The Birth of Football.

hook.text: Humans have kicked balls for thousands of years. But modern football was born in one London pub.

buildup.text: In 1863, representatives from 12 clubs met at the Freemasons' Tavern to agree on a single set of rules.

discovery.text: They founded the Football Association and banned carrying the ball—splitting football from rugby forever.

twist.text: The Chinese game cuju, played over 2,000 years ago, is recognized by FIFA as football's earliest ancestor.

climax.text: From a pub argument to the world's most popular sport—with over four billion fans today.

punchline.text: One meeting, one rulebook, four billion fans.

quiz.question: When was the Football Association founded?
